notices.text: This rewrite is intended to improve clarity and communicate your legitimate intent more effectively. It does not guarantee a different response: model behavior depends on the provider's systems and policies, which this tool does not control or predict.
notices.rationale: The mandatory RW-2 notice. Wording deliberately avoids implying any promise about provider behavior, since the tool never simulates or predicts a provider's decision.

notices.text: Estimated contributing factors are hypotheses, not facts. This analysis uses only information you can observe; it does not reflect any knowledge of a provider's internal systems, moderation logic, or thresholds.
notices.rationale: Marks the Estimated layer as labelled hypothesis so causal factors are never read as confirmed statements about provider internals.

notices.text: This rewrite may still receive the same visible response under the provider's policies. It clarifies your intent; it does not make the request more acceptable to any provider.
notices.rationale: States the honest boundary of a conditional gate: clarity is orthogonal to whether a provider accepts the content.

notices.text: A rewrite was not produced for this request. The observable event, if any, is still explained honestly.
notices.rationale: Accompanies a declined gate so the user understands why no rewritten text appears, without the tool assisting circumvention.
